name: Aembit
description: Aembit — workload identity and access management platform for non-human identities and API credentials.

seo.title: Aembit — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Aembit: Aembit — workload identity and access management platform for non-human identities and API credentials.

when_to_use: Workload-to-workload credential issuance without secrets in code
Non-human identity lifecycle management for microservices
Just-in-time API credential provisioning for CI/CD pipelines
Zero-standing-privilege access for cloud service accounts
SPIFFE-based identity federation across multi-cloud envs

pros: Policy-based access without embedding creds in code
Short-lived credentials reduce leak blast radius
Integrates with AWS, GCP, Snowflake, Stripe
cons: Young product, small community and docs gaps
Closed source with opaque enterprise pricing
Adds a trust broker to your critical path
Learning curve for policy model and concepts
review.verdict: Solid option for non-human IAM if you have the scale to justify a managed trust broker.
review.best_for: Security teams managing many service-to-SaaS credentials across cloud accounts.
review.not_for: Small teams happy with vault-stored static tokens and simple rotation.

lock_in.reason: Workload identity policies proprietary to Aembit control plane

developer_experience.reason: Kubernetes operators and SDKs; niche emerging category
